prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划:
2021–2025年物理类最低位次约18452→19667→19780→21511→24295，呈持续后移趋势，近3年累计后移约4528名，2025年基准约24295名，后移速度明显加快。
2. 【招生计划】该校在湖北省物理类计划2021–2025年分别为83→83→84→87→89人，逐年小幅扩招；2026年计划110人，较2025年大幅扩招约23.6%，扩招幅度显著，按供需弹性 原理将吸引更多考生报考，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年约第83名，近年排名稳定在74–85区间，属中等偏上水平211院校；风景园林学为A+学科（全国顶尖），与该校农林特色一致，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力；但A-及以 上学科仅此1个，学科覆盖面较窄；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及师德师风相关校内通报质疑，可能对报考心理产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第51位（较热），短视频曝光度中等偏上；2024年曾出现陕 西文科投档线异常下降记录，但物理类未见明显断档信号。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门专业社会热度持续升温，该校物理类招生涵盖计算机类、自动化、电气工 程等热门方向，有助于吸引考生；本省2026年物理类考生估算约25.1万人，较2025年24.98万人略有增加（+0.5%），竞争小幅加剧，2025年物理类本科批426分 ，近年波动不大；该校位于北京，对湖北省考生有较强跨省吸引力；地域招生汇总显示该校在湖北省招生占比约2.7%（2025年），属中等偏低水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年大幅扩招（+23.6%）带来的竞争加剧效应、声誉偏负面对热度的轻微抑制、以及热门专业招生的吸引力，在2025年基准24295名基础上 ，再结合声誉负面因素做小幅回调修正；预测最低位次约27685名，区间27185–28185名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 18452 → 19667 → 19780 → 21511 → 24295, showing a continuous backward trend. In the past 3 years, the cumulative backward shift was about 4528 places. The 2025 baseline is about 24295, with the backward speed significantly accelerating.
2. [Enrollment Plan] The university's Physics Category enrollment plan in Hubei Province from 2021 to 2025 was 83 → 83 → 84 → 87 → 89, with a slight annual increase; the 2026 plan is 110, a substantial increase of about 23.6% compared to 2025. According to the principle of supply-demand elasticity, this will attract more candidates to apply, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 83rd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, stable in the 74–85 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level among 211 institutions. Landscape Architecture is an A+ discipline (top in the country), consistent with the university's forestry and agriculture characteristics, strongly attracting applicants to related majors. However, there is only one A- or above discipline, indicating a narrow disciplinary coverage. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving internal school notifications questioning teacher ethics, which may somewhat suppress application enthusiasm. Douyin popularity ranks 51st (relatively hot), with moderate to high short video exposure. In 2024, there was an abnormal drop in the admission score line for liberal arts in Shaanxi, but no clear signal of a score gap for Physics Category.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to see rising social popularity. The university's Physics Category enrollment covers popular directions like Computer Science, Automation, and Electrical Engineering, helping to attract candidates. In 2026, the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in the province is about 251,000, a slight increase (+0.5%) from 249,800 in 2025, leading to a minor intensification of competition. The 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch score line is 426 points, with little fluctuation in recent years. The university is located in Beijing, which has a strong cross-provincial appeal to Hubei candidates. Regional enrollment summary shows that the university's enrollment proportion in Hubei Province is about 2.7% (2025), which is moderately low.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the intensified competition effect from the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+23.6%), the slight suppression of popularity due to negative reputation, and the attractiveness of popular major enrollment, based on the 2025 baseline of 24295, with a small adjustment for negative reputation factors, the predicted minimum ranking is about 27685, with a range of 27185–28185.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 27185–28185, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Landscape Architecture, an A+ discipline, is the university's flagship and worth considering). Tier 1 popular engineering majors (Computer Science, Automation, Electrical Engineering) can be targeted as reach goals, while Tier 3 majors serve as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (<27185), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 popular majors. If your ranking is close to the upper bound (>28185), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety choices.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 3175 → 3862 → 3996 → 4120 → 4675, showing a continuous backward trend. Over the past 5 years, the cumulative backward shift is about 1500 places, with the 2025 baseline at approximately 4675. The rate of backward shift has accelerated in recent years. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hubei from 2021 to 2025 was 21 → 21 → 21 → 20 → 19 students, showing a slight reduction trend. The 2026 plan is 19 students, unchanged from 2025, indicating a stable plan with no changes.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, it ranks approximately 83rd, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level among 211 universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving internal school notifications questioning teacher ethics and conduct, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 51st (relatively hot), with moderate to high short video exposure. Landscape Architecture is an A+ discipline (top in the country), and the university enrolls Landscape Architecture majors in History Category, which has strong appeal to candidates. However, there is only one A- or above discipline.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature are socially hot. The university's History Category enrollment includes directions such as Law (Outstanding Rule of Law Talent Experimental Class), Finance, and Applied Psychology, which have certain appeal. The estimated number of History Category candidates in the province in 2026 is about 142,700, a slight increase (+0.9%) from 141,400 in 2025, leading to a slight intensification of competition. The 2025 History Category undergraduate batch line is 442 points. The university is located in Beijing, which has strong cross-provincial appeal to Hubei candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025, the slight inhibitory effect of negative reputation on popularity, and the slight increase in candidate numbers, a small upward adjustment is made based on the 2025 baseline of 4675, incorporating the increase in candidates and reputation factors. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4705, with a range of 4205–5205.
